name: cross-modal-fashion-retrieval
description: Autonomous Cross-Modal Fashion Retrieval Using Vision-Language Foundation Models

scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.dev: echo Start backend and frontend in separate terminals
scripts.build-index: cd backend && python -c "from app.core.catalog_service import CatalogService; from app.core.vector_search import VectorSearchEngine; from app.core.model_loader import get_model_loader; from app.core.embedding_service import EmbeddingService; print('Building index...'); loader = get_model_loader(); embedder = EmbeddingService(loader); catalog = CatalogService(); engine = VectorSearchEngine(); products = catalog.scan_catalog(); embeddings = embedder.encode_images_batch([p['image_path'] for p in products]); engine.build_index(embeddings, products); print('Index built successfully')"
